title.en: Therefore, they didn't take Ye Tian seriously a...

content.en:
Ye Tian is very famous in the Abyss of Aromu, but he is not very famous in the other main departments.

Even though many of the peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses in the main department knew him, after all, he had an amazing record in the Huoxi Time and Space Battlefield at the beginning, and he was in the eyes of those peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

But at that time, Ye Tian was just an ordinary Gu Demon level realm, who would care!

And at the beginning, most of the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses had never entered the Huoxi space-time battlefield, and Gen~ didn't know Ye Tian.

And these peak ancient demon-level powerhouses didn't know Ye Tian, just that Ye Tian was a lonely and unknown peak ancient demon-level powerhouse.

After all, in their opinion, they all knew those famous peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, and Ye Tian was too unfamiliar, obviously not a too powerful peak ancient demon-level powerhouse.

Therefore, they didn't take Ye Tian seriously at all.

"That's supposed to be me saying to you, get out!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Look for death!"

These several peak ancient demon-level powerhouses were extremely angry, and without saying a word, they directly made a move against Ye Tian.

Of course, they were also afraid that Ye Tian's background would be unusual, so as to provoke the ultimate ancient demon-level powerhouse, so they were not ready to kill Ye Tian, and only severely injured Ye Tian.

After all, their main body of Yingying is not strong, and with only two ultimate ancient demons, they still have to keep a low profile.

Moreover, now that the major main departments are still in the period of cooperation, if there is a matter of the fall of the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, it will undoubtedly make the ultimate ancient demons angry.

Rumble!!!!!

Several peak ancient demons came to besiege and kill in unison, wanting to severely damage Ye Tian.

And at this time, Ye Tian no longer left his hand, and directly broke out his Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane - Extreme Path Ultimate Sword Realm!

Rumble!!!!!

The Extreme Dao Ultimate Sword Realm covered this area, and at the same time, the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm and the six space-time rule realms of the Consummation Realm were all suppressed.

Almost instantly, these several peak ancient demon-level powerhouses were unable to move.

Puff puff!!!

The power of the Extreme Dao Ultimate Sword Realm's sword Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule turned into countless sword filaments, penetrating the bodies of these several peak ancient demon-level powerhouses.

However, Ye Tian also kept his hand.

After all, there must be ultimate ancient demons behind these peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, and if he kills them, the ultimate ancient demons of the main department of Ah Luo's mother will definitely not give him a cover.

When the time comes, he will have to face the ultimate ancient demon!

If it was before, he dared to kill the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses of the other main divisions, after all, the ultimate ancient demons of the other main divisions would not dare to kill into the abyss of the Arrowmother!

But now it's different, the Abyss of Aromu has merged with the space-time bubbles of the other main parts, and those Ultimate Ancient Demons can easily enter the Abyss of Aromu.

Therefore, he didn't kill these several peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, but only severely injured them.

......

"Extreme Ultimate Arcane !!!"

The faces of these peaking ancient demon-level powerhouses changed drastically.

They originally thought that Ye Tian was just an ordinary peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, but they didn't expect it to be a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse who had comprehended the ultimate arcane of the Extreme Dao.

This kind of peak ancient demon-level powerhouse is undoubtedly the kind that is almost invincible among the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, and there are not a few of the three hundred and sixty-five main departments.

After all, it was too difficult for a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse to comprehend and create an Extreme Ultimate Arcane!

"Spare our lives, we are the peak ancient demon level from the main department of the shadow!"

These peak ancient demon level hurriedly said.

Ye Tian's heart moved, and he put away the Extreme Dao Ultimate Sword Realm.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian said.

Swish!!!

These peak ancient demon-level powerhouses quickly fled with their seriously injured bodies, and disappeared in the blink of an eye.

And this treasure land fell into Ye Tian's hands.

He quickly began to scavenge for the resources in this treasure land.

There are still a lot of resources in this treasure land, and there are many resources that can help peak ancient demon-level powerhouses improve their cultivation.

And.

Ye Tian also found more than a dozen top-level ultimate ancient treasures in this treasure land, including one ultimate ancient treasure involving time and space.

After a period of time, Ye Tian left this treasure land.

Although there are still some resources here, it is not easy to find, and he is too lazy to continue looking, and this is not the Abyss of Aromu, but the territory near the other main parts.

So, he didn't want to stay here any longer.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to look for other opportunities in this large space-time bubble.

this day.

When Ye Tian was crossing a certain area, a deep gaze looked over from an area.

Seeing that gaze, Ye Tian's pupils shrank, and his whole body trembled.

"It's the ultimate ancient demon!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

There was no doubt that the Ultimate Ancient Demon noticed him and looked at him.

Of course, he didn't cause trouble in the other party's main department, that person just looked at him and didn't do anything.

Swish!

Ye Tian quickly left and disappeared.

Eagle Ministry.

A copy of Ye Tian's body was still left in his dojo, and all the resources accumulated over the years were sent here.

"It's no wonder that the major main departments have agreed to fuse the space-time bubble, and too many resources have been born, and the resources collected in this period of time are comparable to all the resources accumulated in the past years, and even exceed them by several times. "

"This is just the resources I have collected, if you count the resources obtained by other peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses, it is definitely an astronomical amount. "

"And those ultimate ancient demons must have also gone to collect resources, and even looked for other opportunities, and they will only get more resources than me, not less than me. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

But the real reason why these Ultimate Ancient Demons fused the space-time bubble was definitely not for this resource, I am afraid that there was a deeper purpose.

He can't explore the secret for the time being, so let's first raise his cultivation to the limit of the peak ancient demon level, and then find a way to impact the ultimate ancient demon level.

If he doesn't enter the Ultimate Ancient Demon for a day, he won't be able to get in touch with the true core of this era.

......

The core area of a large space-time bubble.

This place has been sealed off by the Dovi Ancient Demons, and many Ultimate Ancient Demons have come here, all watching here.

And where they looked, a spherical treasure was being conceived.

"Could this be the legendary Ultimate Treasure of the Space-Time Extreme Path?"

An Ultimate Ancient Demon said excitedly.

The most precious treasure that appeared before was a pseudo-space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure, and the appearance of that treasure caused many Ultimate Ancient Demons to kill, and nearly seventy percent of the Ultimate Ancient Demons fell.

And in that battle, there are not many ultimate ancient demons that have survived so far, and one of them is the Dovi Ancient Demon.

Of course, at that time, she did not have such invincible combat power.

But now, she is a real invincible talent in this era!
